Log:
  Add textproc/py-sphinxcontrib-htmlhelp

  sphinxcontrib-htmlhelp is a sphinx extension which renders HTML help files.

  WWW: https://www.sphinx-doc.org/

  PR:		244677
  Submitted by:	Willem Jan Withagen <wjw@digiware.nl>
